title: canary_signature_not_constant test canary never fires
description: ecdsa.rs canary_signature_not_constant has an empty if sig1 == sig2 {} block. The test name implies it detects identical signatures (which would indicate catastrophic RNG failure — same nonce twice), but the empty branch means equal signatures are silently accepted. wolfCrypt's wc_ecc_sign_hash is not RFC 6979 deterministic by default; if two signatures are equal the RNG produced the same nonce twice, which is a catastrophic signing failure that should not go undetected even in tests. Fix: replace the empty if block with an assert_ne\! or at minimum an eprintln\! warning so the canary actually fires.
